use.flag: Build the Qt-based GUI stack (silx-view, silx.gui.*) and pull in PySide6 plus the matplotlib/pyopengl/qtawesome/qtconsole/pillow/pint/pooch/scipy/hdf5plugin/python-dateutil dependency set. Requires USE=opencl.
Pull in dev-python/h5pyd so silx.io.h5py_utils can browse remote HSDS-served HDF5 datasets
Enable the OpenCL-backed kernels in silx.opencl by pulling dev-python/pyopencl and dev-python/mako
